title: AOZITA 6 Pack Acrylic Qtip Holder Dispenser for Cotton Ball, Cotton Swab, Cotton Round Pads, Floss - Clear Plastic Apothecary Jar Set, Bathroom Canister Storage Organization, Vanity Makeup Organizer
description:
About this item
Item Includes 18 Pcs - 6 pack clear acrylic qtip holder dispenser with lids [ 3pcs 12oz & 3pcs 10oz ] + 6 clear labels with black pre-printed words (Cotton Balls, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Pads, Floss Picks, Bath Salt, Hair Accessory) + 6 white labels
Ideal Size Storage Containers - These canisters are perfect organizer for small objects, quite easy to store and take out, such as Q-tip, cotton ball, cotton swab, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampon, bath salts, hair tie band, makeup brush, beauty egg, face brush, crayons, candy, pens, clip and more small things
Functional & Beauty In Every Space - These apothecary jars are good decor elements, accessories set for most home decor clearance, such as restroom supplies, bathroom essentials accessories, vanity organizing, bathroom shelves, bedroom, kitchen or office.
Thick Clear Smooth Acrylic - The 6 cute jars and lids are made of thick plastic with smooth edge, be safe and hard not to be broken. Lids 100% fit the jars to keep from dust and easy to open and close
Practical Labels - Our carefully prepared transparent labels are commonly used by most people. You can choose to use them directly or write item names on white labels.
reviews_5s: The AOZITA Clear Qtip Holder Set seamlessly blends practicality with minimalist design. Crafted from durable, food-grade plastic, this 18-piece ensemble is both BPA-free and devoid of any chemical odor. The collection, featuring six jars with lids in two sizes, is complemented by a set of pre-printed and blank labels for easy organization. Designed to store a variety of small items neatly, these containers are perfect for enhancing the decor of any bathroom, bedroom, or office space, promising both functionality and aesthetic appeal in one package.I absolutely adore these storage holders for cotton balls and similar items! Check out the photo of my medicine cabinet—it's exactly the organized look I envisioned. The set includes three 10 oz holders and three 12 oz holders, making them perfect for keeping everything neat and tidy. Plus, they arrived quickly and were packaged exceptionally well. Highly recommend!I decided to purchase this item because I wanted to organize my vanity and it did just that. l loved that it came with labels if you wanted to stick them to the container. I used them to store cotton pads, Bobby pins, q-tips, floss picks, and hair ties. They look small but it stores a lot which I also liked.I love these! Very nice not cheap feeling and looks great!I used this for what they have them listed for. They seem to be durable & are true to size. They are easy to open & are light weight. They are made of plastic. I like them & would recommend for the price.The product was a great value and I’d buy it again.Perfect for daughter’s hair ties and clips!These are great and the ideal size for use in the bathroom.Muy importante para las niñas desde pequeñas aprender a organizar los utensilios para el cabello.
reviews_1s:
I ordered the six pack because I needed them today and of course one of them comes getting crackedAs the title says. Another Amazon junk item from China that falsely claims it’s something it’s not. There’s a difference between acrylic and clear plastic. This is such cheap plastic, they will crack easily.Ridiculously small and not useful for much of anything, unless your a knome.I must say that I am very disappointed with my purchase.
My initial order the container was all cracked, I got a replacement. The replacement left a lot to be desired, the lids just sits on top of the container, it doesn’t close (no seal, it’s not secure). It appears that the lids are not the container size or it’s just there for having a lid, either way I am not happy with my purchase. I will be returning the item.

Avoid!These plastic containers are so thin and cheat, and cheap looking. I can save plastic gelato or other grocery containers and have a much better product without spending more money. Moreover they sent 3 larger containers with two lids and 3 smaller containers with 4 lids. I regret the purchase, but do not know if it is even worth the time and effort it will take to return them.Don’t order these if you truly want 10 Oz jars. I ordered some over a year ago that were 10oz. I needed the same size but ordered these even though I didn’t need 6 but they were a good price so I ordered them. When they came they’re were literally 3 10oz sitting inside of 3 larger ones maybe 12oz. so I had to return them. Same thing happened with they’re 4 10oz jars; 2 sitting inside of 2. How do they not know a 10oz jar CANNOT fit inside of another 10oz it can only stand on top because they’re suppose to all the same size❓I just had to order 3 from the same company I originally bought them from.I ordered a six pack and only received 3 jars. Very disappointing!I was looking for bathroom organization and what I got were toy trinkets. The containers were so small, even the smallest Qtip box wouldn’t fit in one of the containers.They are nice looking enough and they hold stuff, but it is such a pain that the lids just fall off. No click in, not even some extra lip room to keep them held on. They just sit on top and they fall of at the slightest touch. I have spent too much time looking for these clear lids on the bathroom floor every time I try to get something off of the bathroom shelf. Such a pain.All of the stickers are missing from my order. Each of the lids has scratches all over. So not only am I missing part of the order I paid for, but the lids arrived damaged too. Don't waste your time on this.
